title: Replication Crisis Overview
script_summary: An overview of the replication crisis in science and its implications.

segments.voiceover: Here's what science actually says about the replication crisis.
The replication crisis means many scientific studies can't be duplicated, raising questions about their validity.
Imagine investing years into research, only to find out it might be built on shaky ground.
Studies show up to 70% of psychology findings fail replication.
This challenges not only research methods but also public trust in science.
Curious about how we can fix this? Hit subscribe for more insights!
